requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and GNBS Electrical Equipment Control
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线及GNBS电气设备监管
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線及GNBS電氣設備監管

summary.en: GNBS monitors imported and locally manufactured products against compulsory national standards and lists electrical and electronic appliances plus electrical equipment and fittings among monitored categories. Product certification may provide assurance that products conform to standards or other normative documents, although GNBS describes its listed product certification programme as voluntary for named local product categories. For EV chargers, official charger-specific mandatory standards were not confirmed from GNBS sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters should use IEC 61851-1 as the international safety baseline for conductive EVSE and IEC 61851-23 for DC EV supply equipment, then confirm the applicable GNBS import inspection, test certificate, labelling, and registration route for the HS code and product configuration.
summary.zh: GNBS依据强制性国家标准监管进口和本地制造产品，并将电气和电子器具、电气设备及配件列为受监管类别。产品认证可为产品符合标准或其他规范性文件提供保证，但GNBS也说明其列明的产品认证计划对若干本地产品类别为自愿性质。截至2026年6月14日，未能从GNBS来源确认专门适用于电动汽车充电桩的强制标准；出口商应以IEC 61851-1作为传导式EVSE国际安全基线，以IEC 61851-23作为直流EV供电设备基线，并针对HS编码和产品配置向GNBS确认进口检验、测试证书、标签及注册路径。
summary.zht: GNBS依據強制性國家標準監管進口和本地製造產品，並將電氣和電子器具、電氣設備及配件列為受監管類別。產品認證可為產品符合標準或其他規範性文件提供保證，但GNBS也說明其列明的產品認證計劃對若干本地產品類別為自願性質。截至2026年6月14日，未能從GNBS來源確認專門適用於電動汽車充電樁的強制標準；出口商應以IEC 61851-1作為傳導式EVSE國際安全基線，以IEC 61851-23作為直流EV供電設備基線，並針對HS編碼和產品配置向GNBS確認進口檢驗、測試證書、標籤及註冊路徑。

standards_or_laws: GNBS Product Inspection — compulsory national standards monitoring for imported and locally manufactured products
GNBS Registry for Importers and Manufacturers — electrical and electronic appliances; electrical fittings and equipment
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)

summary.en: China's comparable EVSE baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging systems, with China-specific GB/T connector, signalling and DC communication requirements. China-market safety files may include domestic type tests, CCC-adjacent electrical component evidence, GB/T 20234 connector evidence, and GB/T 27930 DC communication reports, but these are not automatically IEC 61851 clause-level evidence for a Guyana import or project file.
summary.zh: 中国可比EVSE基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统，并包含中国特有的GB/T接口、信号和直流通信要求。中国市场安全文件可能包括国内型式试验、与CCC相关的电气部件证据、GB/T 20234接口证据和GB/T 27930直流通信报告，但这些不会自动成为圭亚那进口或项目文件中的IEC 61851逐条证据。
summary.zht: 中國可比EVSE基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統，並包含中國特有的GB/T接口、信號和直流通訊要求。中國市場安全文件可能包括國內型式試驗、與CCC相關的電氣部件證據、GB/T 20234接口證據和GB/T 27930直流通訊報告，但這些不會自動成為圭亞那進口或項目文件中的IEC 61851逐條證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products, insulation and protective earthing test data, residual-current and ground-fault protection evidence, over-temperature protection data, enclosure IP rating, installation manual, labels, and GNBS-facing test certificates or declarations. Confirm whether GNBS requires importer registration, product inspection release, specific compulsory national standards, or additional local labelling before import. A standalone GB/T 18487 report is useful design evidence but not a direct IEC 61851 or GNBS conformity substitute.
gap.zh: 应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、直流产品IEC 61851-23证据、绝缘和保护接地测试数据、剩余电流和接地故障保护证据、过温保护数据、外壳IP等级、安装手册、标签，以及面向GNBS的测试证书或声明。进口前应确认GNBS是否要求进口商注册、产品检验放行、特定强制性国家标准或额外本地标签。单独的GB/T 18487报告可作为设计证据，但不能直接替代IEC 61851或GNBS符合性。
gap.zht: 應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、直流產品IEC 61851-23證據、絕緣和保護接地測試數據、剩餘電流和接地故障保護證據、過溫保護數據、外殼IP等級、安裝手冊、標籤，以及面向GNBS的測試證書或聲明。進口前應確認GNBS是否要求進口商註冊、產品檢驗放行、特定強制性國家標準或額外本地標籤。單獨的GB/T 18487報告可作為設計證據，但不能直接替代IEC 61851或GNBS符合性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where GNBS product inspection, compulsory national standards, importer registration, project owner specification, or electrical installation approval applies; EVSE-specific national rule not confirmed from official GNBS sources
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; additional IEC/GNBS evidence is needed for Guyana

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 61851 evidence and GNBS import/product-control checks as separate gates. GB/T safety reports should be mapped clause by clause and supplemented with IEC-format test evidence before Guyana shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将IEC 61851证据和GNBS进口/产品监管核查视为两个独立关口。中国GB/T安全报告应逐条映射，并在圭亚那发货前补充IEC格式测试证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將IEC 61851證據和GNBS進口/產品監管核查視為兩個獨立關口。中國GB/T安全報告應逐條映射，並在圭亞那發貨前補充IEC格式測試證據。
